pr.title: RHOAIENG-59760: Rename RELATED_IMAGE_OSE_KUBE_RBAC_PROXY_IMAGE to RELATED_IMAGE_ODH_KUBE_RBAC_PROXY_IMAGE
pr.body:
Remove the legacy RELATED_IMAGE_OSE_KUBE_RBAC_PROXY_IMAGE env var entries
from the bundle and catalog files to align with the ODH naming convention.
The replacement RELATED_IMAGE_ODH_KUBE_RBAC_PROXY_IMAGE entries already
exist in all affected files, so the old OSE-prefixed entries are removed
to avoid duplicates.

Closes RHOAIENG-59760

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Gowtham Shanmugasundaram <gshanmug@redhat.com>
pr.author: jira-autofix[bot]
